title: Delicate Smoky Peruvian Padron Peppers Skewers
description: Buttery and bouncy, these Peruvian padron pepper skewers are a show-off dish featuring smoky and cold flavors, perfect for ovo-vegetarian diets, served on a comal
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat
Thread the padron peppers onto skewers, leaving a small space between each pepper
In a small bowl, mix together the butter, garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper
Brush the butter mixture onto the padron peppers
Grill the padron peppers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred
Remove the peppers from the heat and squeeze with lime juice
Serve the peppers on a comal, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired
Allow the peppers to cool to room temperature before serving
